subject: Correcting portal k8s configmap service names
commit_message:
Correcting portal k8s configmap service names

The service.name is really a port name and was being used wrong.
Need a better way than this to get dependant chart names.

This gets it working.

Issue-ID: OOM-842

Change-Id: I6a78a5adb0e69524a90aa3386009a0d87ebed73c
Signed-off-by: Mandeep Khinda <mandeep.khinda@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

robot times out from the health check command:
Basic Portal Health Check                                             | FAIL |
Test timeout 1 minute exceeded.

But if you run the same thing manually from the robot container it passes after about 1 min 15sec..

root@dev-robot-65548768bb-6hm8b:/# curl -i http://dev-portal-app.onap:8989/ONAPPORTAL/portalApi/healthCheck
HTTP/1.1 200 OK

Change has been successfully merged by Mike Elliott

Patch Set 1:

I am afraid that using Release.Name anywhere prevents installing onap in parts (like message-router, aai, vid) and then adding to it sdc in another command. This is needed in order to be able to work on specific components (as a developer for example) without redeploying all onap (operational efficiency).
e.g.: 
helm install local/onap --name dev-base --namespace onap -f values-base.yaml
helm install local/onap --name dev-work --namespace onap -f values-dev.yaml
